Rising from a moonlit pool, water streaming off her shoulders and arms in glittering rivulets.
Directing stream currents with outstretched fingers, water obeying her gesture and splitting around stones.
Dissolving her legs into cascading waterfall, her torso still solid as foam swirls around her.
Cupping water in both palms, lifting a trembling sphere overhead that defies gravity.
Swimming upstream through rapids, her body cutting through churning current without effort.
Sitting at a spring's source as bubbles rise rhythmically around her submerged waist.
Combing liquid hair with webbed fingers, each stroke releasing a shower of luminous droplets.
Touching a pale fish with one fingertip, breathing life back as it flickers awake.
Splashing through shallows, each footfall erupting into a small fountain beneath her heel.
Drawing glowing sigils on the surface with her fingertip, symbols pulsing before dissolving.
Merging with the waterfall's curtain, her face visible through the translucent rushing veil.
Catching an autumn leaf mid-air before it touches water, holding it gently.
Submerging completely then emerging in one fluid motion, her form coalescing from scattered spray.
Shaping stream water into a spiraling column around her raised arm with circular gestures.
Becoming transparent at the waist where pool water passes through her semi-solid body.
Gathering current between her hands, compressing water into a dense spinning orb.
Leaping from the pool in an arc, her body trailing water that hangs suspended.
Resting fingertips on still water, sending perfect concentric ripples outward in deliberate rhythm.
Running her hand along the stream bed, coaxing new springs to bubble forth.
Dipping beneath the surface then shooting upward in a geyser of her own making.
Weaving her fingers through rushing current, braiding water into temporary flowing ropes.
Pressing both palms to a stagnant eddy, stirring it back to clear flowing health.
Stepping onto water's surface without breaking tension, testing her weight on liquid skin.
Exhaling mist that mingles with spray, her breath becoming one with stream fog.
Tilting her head back as waterfall pours through her open mouth and reformed elsewhere.
